name: skybound-isles
description: Dreamy ethereal floating-islands phone wallpaper (hero-island variant)
prompt: A single massive floating island dominating the foreground, lush green cliffs and ancient trees with long waterfalls cascading off its underside into deep clouds far below, a few smaller islands receding into a vast pastel sky, dramatic sense of scale and height, warm golden-hour light with gentle bloom and soft haze, glowing distant horizon, dreamy ethereal atmosphere, weightless and serene, peach and soft-blue and warm gold palette, painterly fantasy concept art, epic vertical composition with deep sky and depth
